description: Follow-up op N-005 decision (behouden, disabled). Behoud billing-functions/, billing-webhooks/, migration 20240414162131_basejump-billing.sql, src/lib/actions/billing.ts, src/components/basejump/account-billing-status.tsx — code blijft. Verwijder ALLEEN UI-toegang: (1) settings-navigation.tsx — remove "Billing" menu items. (2) src/app/dashboard/[accountSlug]/settings/billing/page.tsx + src/app/dashboard/(personalAccount)/settings/billing/page.tsx — return 404 of redirect naar dashboard. (3) account-billing-status component niet renderen in dashboard-header. Env vars STRIPE_* blijven in supabase/functions/.env.example gedocumenteerd (met N-005 caveat). Bij add-back later: alleen UI-links teruzetten.
title: Disable Basejump billing UI + navigation links
